examples: The activities of phosphoenolpyruvate carboxy-lase and NADP linked malic enzyme were found to be rather low.
Phosphoenolpyruvate (PEP) is one of the two phosphoryl group donors in the synthesis of ATP during glycolysis.
PEPCK catalyzes the reaction whereby oxaloacetate becomes phosphoenolpyruvate, a rate limiting step in the metabolic process (2).
